modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Reach Display is frozen and stuck on one image.

full_description_text: 
The digital screens at the Building Name are currently frozen, displaying a single image without any change. This issue was reported during a live call, indicating that the display is not functioning as expected. The user is unable to see any updates or new content on the Reach Display.
short_description: Reach Display is frozen and stuck on one image.
description: The digital screens at the Building Name are currently frozen, displaying a single image without any change. This issue was reported during a live call, indicating that the display is not functioning as expected. The user is unable to see any updates or new content on the Reach Display.
